sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111391" key="filo/plektos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλό-πλεκτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n111391.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">usually braided,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κόμα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.206</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antip.Sid.</author> </bibl>; fort.</sense> </entryFree>
